prompt: Create a highly detailed cinematic steampunk fantasy portrait of a cute small Shih Tzu standing full body in the center of the frame, looking directly at the viewer with large glossy dark eyes and a calm heroic expression. The dog has fluffy cream and tan fur, long floppy ears, a rounded muzzle, and a plume-like tail curling behind its right side. Dress it as an ornate Victorian airship pilot: exactly 6 main outfit/accessory elements are visible — 1 brown leather aviator cap with brass goggles on top, 1 fitted brown leather jacket with cream shearling collar and cuffs, 1 layered waistcoat and shirt with tiny brass buttons, 1 diagonal strap and belt system with pouches, 1 pair of tailored dark trousers, and 1 pair of worn brown lace-up boots. Add numerous tiny brass gears, compass-like medallions, chains, buckles, pins, and clockwork ornaments on the jacket and belts, but keep the dog’s face unobstructed. Set the scene in a wide golden steampunk city and airship dock with wet reflective cobblestone pavement, ornate brass machinery, pipes, towers, glowing round windows, railings, steam vents, and warm golden lights. Place one large blurred zeppelin airship in the upper right background, with industrial towers and round mechanical structures fading into mist on the left and center background. Use dramatic warm backlighting, soft fog, floating golden dust sparks, shallow depth of field, realistic fur texture, polished brass reflections, rich brown and gold color grading, ultra-detailed 3D/photoreal fantasy styling, symmetrical centered composition, low eye-level camera angle, 4:3 landscape aspect ratio. No text, no watermark, no extra animals, no cropped feet.
